title: Deliciously Light British Cheese Welsh Rarebit
description: A nutty and light festive British dish featuring hot smoked paprika, perfect for a low-calorie friendly meal, this Welsh Rarebit is a delicious twist on a classic recipe.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over low heat.
Add the shredded cheese, hot smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the saucepan, stirring until the cheese is melted and smooth.
In a small bowl, whisk together the low-fat milk and large egg until well combined.
Add the milk and egg mixture to the cheese mixture, stirring until the sauce is smooth and creamy.
Toast the whole wheat bread slices until lightly browned.
Place the toasted bread slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Spoon the cheese sauce over the toasted bread slices, making sure to cover the entire surface.
Place the baking sheet under the broiler and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
Remove the baking sheet from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
